parameters.subject: =SOC Alert: {{ $json.alertCount }} High-Risk Threats Detected ({{ new Date().toLocaleDateString() }})
parameters.message:
=

Hello Team,

The Automated SOC Pipeline has completed its latest log analysis. Significant threats were identified and mitigated.

Summary of Findings:

  • Total IPs Analyzed: {{ $json.summaryStats.totalIPs }}
  • Critical/High Risk Alerts: {{ $json.alertCount }}
  • Autonomous Blocks: {{ $json.summaryStats.actionCounts.BLOCK }}

A detailed Security Operations Audit Report has been attached to this email for your review.

This is an automated response. No action is required for blocked IPs.
